text: I'd like to show you a technique of uniportal thoracoscopic surgery to resect a solitary fibrous tumor of the pleura attached to the left upper lobe.
In this case, we chose to use a gel point port in order to use CO2 insufflation.
Through the port, we can pass the stapler
place the camera in the apex of the incision with the help of a small trocar, and all the instruments are passed through the same incision in the same fashion that uniportal surgery is performed.
It works very nicely if you need to use CO2 insufflation for your cases.
This was performed with a four centimeter incision.
Thank you for watching my video.
I hope you enjoyed this video and see you next time.
